experiment_title: 氢气燃烧生成水的实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="氢气燃烧生成水的实验" goal="验证氢气燃烧生成水的产物，并观察水珠在烧杯内壁的形成" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="flask_1" type="flask" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="delivery_tube_1" type="delivery_tube" />
      <Component id="burette_1" type="burette" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20ml" />
      <Component id="burner_1" type="burner" />
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="iron_clamp_1" type="iron_clamp" />
      <Component id="match_1" type="match" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Zinc" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Dilute_Sulfuric_Acid" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="flask_1" reagent="Zn" mass="2 g" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="flask_1" reagent="H2SO4" volume="20 mL" id="step_1" />
      
      <Attach vessel="flask_1" support="stand_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="delivery_tube_1" vessel="flask_1" id="step_3" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_4" />
      
      <Insert tool="match_1" vessel="delivery_tube_1" id="step_5" />
      
      <Attach vessel="beaker_1" support="iron_clamp_1" id="step_6" />
      <Insert tool="delivery_tube_1" vessel="beaker_1" id="step_7" />
      <Wait time="60s" id="step_8" />
      
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_9" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 组装氢气发生装置并加入反应物：将锌和稀硫酸加入烧瓶，安装支架和导管，准备氢气生成。
等待反应进行，确保氢气生成并排除空气。
用火柴点燃导管口的氢气，验证氢气的可燃性。
组装收集装置：固定烧杯，将导管插入烧杯内，为收集燃烧产物做准备。
等待氢气燃烧，观察烧杯内壁水珠的形成，验证产物为水。
